gist.headline: Aureon joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Aureon has officially sprouted in our community showcase! They're using our image and video APIs to give their AI agents some serious visual flair.
gist.summary: Added Aureon to the community showcase, highlighting their integration of Pollinations' image and video generation APIs.
gist.impact: The community can now discover Aureon in the apps directory and explore how they use our Flux and LTX-2.3 models for media generation.
gist.visual_concept: Aureon (golden theme) generating media. Polly the bee as a film director with a golden film reel, alongside the monitor robot displaying generated art.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a glowing golden film reel next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a beautiful landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm golden pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
